Notice Of Motion For Order That Matters Be Deemed Admitted And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Alyssa T. Dang of the law offices of Coddington Hicks & Danforth (650.592.5400) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT JUAN RIVERA'S Motion For Order That Matters Be Deemed Admitted And Imposing Monetary Sanctions is unopposed and GRANTED. Sanctions are awarded in the sum of $337.50 to be paid within twenty days of service by plaintiff of a copy of the Order herein with Notice of Entry. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)
